task_policy.note: Tasks are prototype scenarios that connect POIs, routes, users, property operations, and future robot workflows.

tasks.name: Guide a Visitor to Building 3
tasks.goal: Generate a clear visitor route from the North Gate to Building 3.
tasks.user_value: Residents can share a simple path with guests before they arrive.
tasks.property_value: Reduces repeated visitor guidance questions at the gate and property center.
ai_intents: how can my guest find my building
privacy_notes: Do not expose unit number by default.
Visitor access must follow community access-control rules.

tasks.name: Pick Up a Package
tasks.goal: Help a resident find the package locker from Building 3.
tasks.user_value: Turns a high-frequency daily errand into a visible and easy route.
tasks.property_value: Reduces confusion for new residents and improves service perception.
privacy_notes: Package code or delivery information should never be stored in public route data.

tasks.name: Join Weekend Parent-child Activity

schedule_context.action_hint: Check in to unlock the Family Explorer stamp.

tasks.goal: Let residents discover, sign up for, navigate to, and check in at a community activity.
tasks.user_value: Makes community activities easier to find and attend.
tasks.property_value: Improves activity participation, check-in tracking, and post-event operation data.
ai_intents: what activities are happening this weekend
show me the route to the activity
privacy_notes: Children's information should not be publicly displayed.
Activity participant lists should follow community privacy settings.

tasks.name: Start Community Explorer Quest
tasks.goal: Turn first-week community onboarding into a playful exploration quest.
tasks.user_value: Residents feel the community is alive, discover useful places, and earn a visible identity badge.
tasks.property_value: Property teams can convert onboarding, activity discovery, and community culture into repeatable engagement.
ai_intents: what can I do in this community
privacy_notes: Quest progress should be private by default.
Badge sharing should require explicit resident consent.

tasks.name: Join Evening Basketball Meetup

schedule_context.action_hint: Bring one neighbor or join solo.

tasks.goal: Turn an informal basketball invitation into a discoverable, navigable, and check-in-ready sports side quest.
tasks.user_value: Residents can find nearby sports partners without searching through noisy chat groups.
tasks.property_value: Activates the basketball court and measures demand, attendance, and repeat participation.
privacy_notes: Participant identity should only be visible to confirmed members.
Activity organizers and court rules should be verified before publishing.

tasks.name: Complete a World Maintenance Side Quest

schedule_context.action_hint: Submit one location-aware issue and track the response.

tasks.goal: Let residents help maintain the shared world through a guided, privacy-aware issue discovery loop.
tasks.user_value: Residents gain visible agency and progress by improving a place they use every day.
tasks.property_value: Converts scattered complaints into structured spatial issues with clearer triage and resident follow-up.
ai_intents: report an issue in a shared area
privacy_notes: Do not expose resident identity in public issue feeds.
Photos must avoid faces, unit numbers, vehicle plates, and private spaces.

tasks.name: Report Broken Light near Kids' Playground
tasks.goal: Create a repair report with precise spatial context.
tasks.user_value: Residents can report problems without struggling to describe the exact location.
tasks.property_value: Property teams receive structured, location-aware repair requests.
privacy_notes: Do not attach resident identity to public issue feeds.
Photos should be reviewed for privacy-sensitive content before public display.

tasks.name: Create Weekend Community Activity
tasks.goal: Allow property operators to publish a spatially anchored activity.
tasks.user_value: Residents can discover activities in the community map instead of only in chat groups.
tasks.property_value: Property teams can manage signup, route guidance, check-in, and engagement metrics.
privacy_notes: Property operators should review activity content before publishing.

tasks.name: Robot Fire Passage Patrol
tasks.goal: Generate a structured patrol task for a future service robot.
tasks.user_value: Residents benefit from safer and more consistent community inspections.
tasks.property_value: Property teams can turn inspection workflows into structured robot-ready tasks.
privacy_notes: Robot operation must follow privacy, safety, and property approval rules.
Camera or sensor data should not be stored without explicit governance policies.
